title: ReviewResult
description: Canonical review output schema produced by both Claude (parallel_review) and Codex (review_check) paths. Convention: _source = design doc origin, _roadmap = feature code.

clean.description: Derived by normalizer — true iff zero must-fix and zero should-fix findings remain after confidence gate filtering. NOT model-reported.

findings.description: All findings from this review pass.

lens.description: Lens name (e.g. 'diff-quality', 'security') or 'general' for Codex single-pass.

file.description: File path relative to working directory, or null if not file-specific.

line.description: Line number within file, or null.

severity.description: must-fix: blocks ship. should-fix: next iteration. nit: logged only.

applied_gate.description: The confidence gate that was applied when this finding was emitted. Stamped by normalizer if missing.

agent_type.description: Which model type produced this result. 'judge' is used by stratum_judge for T1-only paths (no LLM dispatched); when T2 fires, agent_type reflects the actual model invoked.

model_id.description: Model identifier (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-5'). Null if not available.

lenses_run.description: IDs of lenses that produced any must-fix or should-fix finding. Populated by merge step in parallel_review; empty array for single-pass Codex review.

auto_fixes.description: Mechanical findings (formatting, typos, simple tests) that can be auto-applied. Populated by merge step.

asks.description: Findings requiring human judgment. Populated by merge step.
